description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-302 (Refactor Help Article Page to Use Database). Consumer-side refactor that MODIFIES apps/web/src/app/help-center/[article]/page.tsx (static->tRPC) and apps/web/src/components/support/article-renderer.tsx (adds tiptapDoc branch), CREATES apps/web/src/components/support/tiptap-node-renderer.tsx (+ tests), and adds an additive sectionCount field to apps/api/src/modules/help-article/help-article.router.ts getByCategory. Baseline captured by running the existing article-renderer + [article] page + integration test suites with istanbul coverage BEFORE any implementation.

apps/web/src/components/support/article-.note: covered within components/support aggregate 91.83% stmt / 92.3% branch
